name: Chocolate-Rasberry Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. Melt butter and chocolate in a heavy large saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Remove from heat. Whisk in sugar, then eggs, one at a time, and vanilla.
5. In a small bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the chocolate mixture and whisk to blend.
7. Stir in the nuts.
8. Pour 2 cups of batter into the pan. Spread preserves over brownie batter.
9. Spoon remaining batter over the preserves.
10. Let stand at room temperature for 20 minutes to thaw the bottom layer.
11. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
12. Transfer to a rack and cool completely.
13. Cut brownies into squares.
Bon Appetit/August/94
